<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 2400; 1000; 4800; 13500; 27500
$FSE-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FSE-UPGRADE$ = Improved Handling; Thermal Vision; High Tech Armory; 24 Karat Gatling Gun
$FSE-UPGRADEICON$ = 15184753790; 15184753514; 15184753289; 15184752970
$FSE-CATEGORY$ = Golden Perks
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS does not consider rev-up time.</ref>
</var>
<div class="overflow-box">
{|class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.16 || 0.8 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1  || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.12 || 0.8 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 0.12 || 0.8 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 13 || 0.1 || 0.6 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.1 || 0.6 || 22 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
